person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
SIBYL OF SALISBURY
Biography
She was the daughter of Walter Fitz-Edward de Salisbury, Lord of Salisbury, and Sibyl de Chaworth his wife.

She was the wife of John Fitz-Gilbert, The Marshal of England.

She was the mother of William Marshal, 1st Earl of Pembroke; John Fitzgilbert II Marshall; Maud FitzJohn Marshall; Anselm FitzJohn Marshall; Henry FitzGilbert Marshall, Exeter and Richard FitzGilbert Mareschall.

She was the sister of Hawise de Salisbury; Walter Salisbury, Brade; Patrick de Salisbury, 1st Earl of Salisbury and Mathilde d'Evereaux.

She is buried in the Priory of Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England.

«b»Children«/b»
They had six children: John, William, Anselm, Henry, Maud, and a Daughter Marshal whose given name is unknown.
Their son William Marshal became Regent of England.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl de Salisbury於1126年11月27日出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire40歲，母親Sibyl Chaworth45歲。她和John FitzGilbert至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1176年6月3日之前在英國威爾斯布洛可爾布洛可 卡素，埋葬在英國維爾爾布拉登斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Salisbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name primarily from Salesbury in Blackburn (Lancashire) but also occasionally from Salisbury (Wiltshire). The Lancashire placename derives from Old English salh ‘willow, sallow’ + burg ‘fortress’, while the Wiltshire placename arises from a shortened form of the Celtic placename Sorviodunum (from an unknown initial element + Celtic dūno- ‘fort’). In the Old English period the second element was dropped and Sorvio- (of unexplained etymology) became Searo- in Old English as the result of folk etymological association the Old English word searu ‘trick’; to this an explanatory burh ‘fortress, manor, town’ was added. The city is recorded in the Domesday Book as Sarisberie; the change of -r- to -l- is the result of later dissimilation.

variants.name: Salsbury
meanings: Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of Salomon or some other Jewish name beginning with Sa-.

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl de Salisbury was born on 27 November 1126, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire, was 40 and her mother, Sibyl Chaworth, was 45. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with John FitzGilbert. She died before 3 June 1176, in Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, and was buried in Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl de Salisbury est née le 27 novembre 1126, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Chaworth, avait 45 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec John FitzGilbert. Elle est décédée avant 3 juin 1176, à Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl de Salisbury am 27. November 1126 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire 40 und ihre Mutter Sibyl Chaworth 45. Sie hatte mit John FitzGilbert mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 3. Juni 1176 in Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con John FitzGilbert. Morì prima del 3 giugno 1176, nel Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibyl de Salisburyが1126年11月27日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshireは40歳，母Sibyl Chaworthは45歳であった。彼女はJohn FitzGilbertとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1176年6月3日以前にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロク カストルで死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアブラデンストクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl de Salisbury(이)가 1126년 11월 27일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl Chaworth(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 John FitzGilbert(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1176년 6월 3일 이전 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크 카스틀에서 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 브라덴스토크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl de Salisbury nasceu em 27 de novembro de 1126, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Chaworth, tinha 45 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com John FitzGilbert. Ela faleceu antes 3 de junho de 1176, em Pembroke Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl de Salisbury родилась 27 ноября 1126 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Chaworth, 45. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от John FitzGilbert. Она умерла перед 3 июнь 1176 г. в местности пемброк кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности браденсток, уилцхир, Англия.
